title: Non-reciprocal topological solitons in active metamaterials
type1_summary: Both files are Nature-hosted source-data PDFs, which are typically figure-specific and replot-ready rather than raw instrument outputs.
type2_summary: No explicit raw/unprocessed files were provided in the inspected file list.
classification_notes: The paper states that all supporting data are available in an external repository, suggesting additional raw data may exist there. However, among the inspected files, only Nature source-data PDFs are present, so the classification is Type 1 for both. No Type 2 files were provided in the file inspection report.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: The paper's data availability statement says all supporting data are in a public repository, while Nature-hosted supplementary/source files are provided as source data PDFs. The paper evidence does not indicate this PDF is raw instrument output.
file_classifications.file_evidence: PDF source-data file from Nature; small-to-moderate size (586.3 KB), consistent with figure/source-data material rather than raw experimental output. No indication of proprietary/raw instrument format or large unprocessed dataset.
file_classifications.reasoning: Given the paper context and the file being a Nature source-data PDF, this is most consistent with figure-specific, replot-ready source data rather than raw measurements. The file type and size support Type 1.
file_classifications.ambiguity: Moderate: the paper emphasizes that all supporting data are in an external repository, so this PDF may be supplementary source data rather than the primary dataset. However, source-data PDFs are classified as Type 1 by definition.
file_classifications.key_columns_or_structure: Not inspectable from metadata alone; likely figure-specific source data embedded in PDF

file_classifications.paper_evidence: The publication provides Nature-hosted source-data PDFs alongside the main repository. There is no indication this PDF contains raw instrument output; it is part of the source-data package.
file_classifications.file_evidence: PDF source-data file from Nature; size 1.0 MB, consistent with figure/source-data content. No evidence of binary/raw measurement format or large unprocessed data tables.
file_classifications.reasoning: As a source-data PDF, this is best treated as cleaned, figure-oriented data that can support replotting with minimal processing. Therefore Type 1.
file_classifications.ambiguity: Moderate: exact internal structure is not visible from the inspection report, but the source-data PDF designation strongly favors Type 1.
file_classifications.key_columns_or_structure: Not inspectable from metadata alone; likely figure-specific source data embedded in PDF

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports non-reciprocal topological solitons in active metamaterials, combining topological mechanics with engineered material dynamics.
paper_analysis.raw_measurement_details: All data supporting the study are publicly available in the repository; publisher-hosted source data/supplementary files are also available as PDFs and a video.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: All data supporting the study are publicly available in the repository; publisher-hosted source data/supplementary files are also available as PDFs and a video.
